title: rhus simplicifolia
intro: Rhus simplicifolia, also known as skunkbush or skunkbrush, is a type of shrub native to the southwestern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rhus simplicifolia include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and wounds, as well as its use as a natural remedy for respiratory issues and digestive problems. Rhus simplicifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, salves, and infusions for topical and internal use, although its preparations may vary depending on the specific application.
